mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_valid_period_conf (ent_code, conf_type, yellow_threshold, yellow_notify_freq, orange_threshold, orange_notify_freq, red_threshold, red_notify_freq) VALUES (#{entCode}, #{confType}, #{yellowThreshold}, #{yellowNotifyFreq}, #{orangeThreshold}, #{orangeNotifyFreq}, #{redThreshold}, #{redNotifyFreq}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE yellow_threshold = VALUES(yellow_threshold), yellow_notify_freq = VALUES(yellow_notify_freq), orange_threshold = VALUES(orange_threshold), orange_notify_freq = VALUES(orange_notify_freq), red_threshold = VALUES(red_threshold), red_notify_freq = VALUES(red_notify_freq)
mapper.select: select c.ent_code, e.ent_name, e.we_com_msg, c.conf_type, c.yellow_threshold, c.yellow_notify_freq, c.orange_threshold, c.orange_notify_freq, c.red_threshold, c.red_notify_freq from t_valid_period_conf c left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = c.ent_code
select ent_code, begin_date, end_date from t_ent_out_pollutant_permit
select ent_code, other_id as item_id, cert_name as item_name, begin_date, end_date from t_other_certificate

select op.ent_code, t.task_id as item_id, op.out_put_name, pc.pollutant_name_cn, t.check_frequency, t.task_date as end_date from t_env_manual_check_task t left join t_ent_output_pollutant poll on poll.out_put_poll_id = t.out_put_poll_id left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = poll.pollutant_code left join t_ent_out_put_info op on op.out_put_id = poll.out_put_id where t.status = 2

select ent_code, material_id as item_id, material_name as item_name, case when expire_date is null then recheck_date when recheck_date is null then expire_date when expire_date < recheck_date then expire_date else recheck_date end as end_date from t_emergency_material
